news.t: Invesco's Larosiliere Talks Income, Yield in 2026

overview.description: The Invesco Rochester High Yield Municipal ETF (IROC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that primarily invests in municipal securities exempt from federal income taxes. It will hold low- to medium-quality municipal securities while aiming for a dollar-weighted average portfolio duration of less than 7.5 years. IROC was launched on Dec 9, 2022 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco's Larosiliere Talks Income, Yield in 2026
data.text: Fixed income is once again a place of exciting opportunities for investors. From U.S. and ex-U.S.
